label: 设置属性
description: 在 focus 场景节点上写入自定义属性 (key, value)。同名 key 覆盖；其他 key 保留。属性会随节点一起参与后续的变换、移植、cells 重写，不会丢失。
description-en: Set a custom attribute (key, value) on the focused scene node. Same key overwrites; other keys are preserved. Attributes follow the node through subsequent transforms, grafting, and cell rewrites.

inputs.name: scene
inputs.label: scene
inputs.description: 目标节点的 scene 端口（focus 指向写入节点）
inputs.description-en: Scene port of the target node (focus points at the node to write).

inputs.name: value
inputs.label: value
inputs.description: 属性值（任意类型）。每次写入一个 value（按 access:item 逐项 fanout）；如需把列表整体作为单值，外层再包一层（如 [[1,2,3]]）以逃逸迭代。
inputs.description-en: Attribute value (any type). Each call writes one value (access:item fans out per item); to store a list as a single value, wrap it once more (e.g. [[1,2,3]]).

outputs.name: scene
outputs.label: scene
outputs.description: 更新后的 scene 端口（focus 不变）
